you should control intake and eat about every three hours.", "resource-id": "com.befit.mealreminder:id/why_paragraph_main", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [140, 878, 1300, 1405], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "When you eat 5 meals a day, you provide your body with perfect amount of energy and nutrients, necessary to function properly. Eating regularly, with correct intervals, helps you to control the quantity of every portion and prevents overeating. Intake small portions to speed up the metabolism and to achieve better shape of your body.\n \nFurthermore short breaks between meals protect from sudden decrease of the glucose level in your blood and ensure satiety.", "resource-id": "com.befit.mealreminder:id/why_paragraph", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [140, 1458, 1300, 2392], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "WHY", "resource-id": "com.befit.mealreminder:id/why_header_why", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [140, 385, 476, 557], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "SHOULD", "resource-id": "com.befit.mealreminder:id/why_header_should", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [494, 393, 1059, 557], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "I EAT", "resource-id": "com.befit.mealreminder:id/why_header_i_eat", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [140, 531, 461, 695], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "5 MEALS", "resource-id": "com.befit.mealreminder:id/why_header_5_meals", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [479, 523, 1074, 695], "componentLabel": "Text"}, {"text": "A DAY?", "resource-id": "com.befit.mealreminder:id/why_header_a_day", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.AppCompatTextView", "bounds": [140, 661, 626, 825], "componentLabel": "Text"}]}
